summary: C7: parity harness extension — seed.sql gains 3 staged_edges rows (accept-verified / reject-with-pre-existing-edge-DELETE / reclassify-PARALLELS-to-CONTRASTS); decision_sequence.json gets edge actions; apply_edge_action in run_cli.py mirrored in web_runner.ts. compare.py already covers edges row-content.

resolution.note: Parity harness now exercises all 3 edge action branches (accept/reject/reclassify) plus retraction of pre-seeded auto-promoted edges. compare.py adds staged_edges. Both shadows produce identical row content.
